ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-5) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's annual salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played during the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games played */,
  "playoff_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games won */,
  "playoff_games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games lost */,
  "championship_won" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the championship in this season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Stadium name) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_channel" TEXT /* TV channel that broadcasted the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., coaching, medical, scouting) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C)
